name: Cranberry Orange Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nuts, chopped or coarsely ground
1 cup Raw cranberries, chopped or coarsely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and soda.
2. Grate the rind of the orange and extract the juice. Mix with 2 tablespoons melted oil (or salad oil) to make about 3/4 cup liquid.
3. Beat the egg well and add it to the liquid mixture.
4. Add the buttermilk to the egg mixture, combining until smooth.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and raw cranberries (chopped or coarsely ground).
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for about 1 hour.
8. Allow to cool completely before storing in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours before cutting.
